    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="id">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LUMIARA — Fashion untuk Semua</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root {
    --black: #080608;
    --dark: #100d14;
    --panel: #16121e;
    --card: #1a1524;
    --purple: #7c3aed;
    --violet: #a855f7;
    --pink: #ec4899;
    --gold: #f59e0b;
    --white: #f5f0ff;
    --muted: #6b6080;
    --soft: #c4b5d4;
    --glow-p: rgba(124,58,237,0.15);
    --glow-pk: rgba(236,72,153,0.12);
    }
    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
    body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
    }
    body::after {
    content:'';
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:9980; pointer-events:none;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0.015) 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0.015) 4px);
    }
    /* ── CURSOR ── */
    .cur { width:8px; height:8px; background:var(--violet); border-radius:50%; position:fixed; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); transition:transform 0.1s; }
    .cur-ring { width:36px; height:36px; border:1.5px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.5); border-radius:50%; position:fixed; pointer-events:none; z-index:9998; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); transition:all 0.14s ease; }
    .cur.big { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2.5); }
    .cur-ring.big { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.6); border-color:var(--pink); }
    /* ── NAV ── */
    nav {
    position:fixed; top:0; width:100%; z-index:500;
    padding:28px 64px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    transition:all 0.4s;
    }
    nav.scrolled {
    background:rgba(8,6,8,0.9);
    backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1);
    padding:18px 64px;
    }
    .nav-logo {
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size:28px; letter-spacing:0.3em;
    color:var(--white); text-decoration:none;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    }
    .nav-logo-dot {
    width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--violet);
    }
    .nav-links { display:flex; gap:40px; }
    .nav-links a {
    font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--muted); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color:var(--white); }
    .nav-right { display:flex; gap:12px; }
    .nav-wa {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    padding:10px 20px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    color:var(--white); text-decoration:none;
    font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase;
    border-radius:2px;
    transition:all 0.3s; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(124,58,237,0.3);
    }
    .nav-wa:hover { box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(124,58,237,0.6); transform:translateY(-1px); }
    /* ── HERO ── */
    .hero {
    min-height:100vh; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    }
    .hero-bg {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 80% 40%, rgba(124,58,237,0.1) 0%, transparent 65%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 70% at 10% 70%, rgba(236,72,153,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 60% 80%, rgba(245,158,11,0.04) 0%, transparent 50%),
    var(--black);
    }
    /* Floating particles */
    .particles { position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; }
    .p {
    position:absolute; border-radius:50%;
    animation:float linear infinite;
    opacity:0;
    }
    @keyframes float {
    0% { opacity:0; transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0); }
    10% { opacity:1; }
    90% { opacity:1; }
    100% { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-100px) scale(1); }
    }
    .hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; padding:0 64px; width:100%; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:60px; align-items:center; padding-top:80px; }
    .hero-left {}
    .hero-eyebrow {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    padding:7px 18px;
    background:rgba(124,58,237,0.12);
    border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.25);
    border-radius:100px;
    font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:32px;
    }
    .eyebrow-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--violet); animation:blink 1.5s infinite; }
    @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1;} 50%{opacity:0.2;} }
    .hero-title {
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size:clamp(64px, 10vw, 148px);
    line-height:0.88; letter-spacing:0.02em;
    margin-bottom:28px;
    }
    .hero-title .t1 { display:block; color:var(--white); }
    .hero-title .t2 {
    display:block;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink), var(--gold));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    background-clip:text;
    }
    .hero-title .t3 {
    display:block; color:transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke:1.5px rgba(245,240,255,0.2);
    }
    .hero-desc {
    font-size:15px; line-height:1.85; color:var(--muted);
    max-width:420px; margin-bottom:44px;
    }
    .hero-desc strong { color:var(--soft); font-weight:600; }
    .hero-btns { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:56px; }
    .btn-grad {
    padding:15px 36px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    color:var(--white); font-size:12px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none; border-radius:2px;
    box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(124,58,237,0.4);
    transition:all 0.3s; cursor:none;
    clip-path:polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 10px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 10px));
    }
    .btn-grad:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(124,58,237,0.6); }
    .btn-wa-hero {
    padding:15px 36px;
    background:transparent;
    color:var(--soft); font-size:12px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,212,0.2);
    border-radius:2px; transition:all 0.3s; cursor:none;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    clip-path:polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 10px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 10px));
    }
    .btn-wa-hero:hover { border-color:var(--violet); color:var(--violet); }
    .hero-trust { display:flex; gap:32px; }
    .trust-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
    .trust-icon { font-size:18px; }
    .trust-text { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.4; }
    .trust-text strong { display:block; color:var(--soft); font-size:13px; }
    /* Hero right — visual */
    .hero-right { position:relative; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
    .hero-card-main {
    width:320px; height:420px;
    background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--panel), var(--card));
    border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2);
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    border-radius:4px;
    box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.08);
    }
    .hero-card-main::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purple), var(--pink), var(--gold));
    }
    .card-bg-letter {
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:260px; letter-spacing:-0.05em;
    color:rgba(124,58,237,0.06); position:absolute; bottom:-30px; right:-20px;
    line-height:1; user-select:none;
    animation:floatLetter 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes floatLetter { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);} 50%{transform:translateY(-16px); } }
    .card-content-overlay {
    position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:28px;
    background:linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(8,6,8,0.95));
    }
    .card-tag { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:8px; }
    .card-name { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:28px; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:6px; }
    .card-price { font-size:14px; color:var(--soft); }
    .floating-badge {
    position:absolute; top:-16px; right:-16px;
    width:88px; height:88px; border-radius:50%;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), #f97316);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(245,158,11,0.4);
    animation:spin 10s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes spin { from{transform:rotate(0deg);} to{transform:rotate(360deg);} }
    .badge-text { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:7px; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--black); font-weight:700; text-align:center; line-height:1.4; }
    .floating-pill {
    position:absolute; left:-60px; top:50%;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2);
    padding:12px 18px; border-radius:100px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }
    .pill-avatar { width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink)); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:14px; }
    .pill-text { font-size:11px; color:var(--soft); line-height:1.4; }
    .pill-text strong { display:block; font-size:12px; color:var(--white); }
    /* ── TICKER ── */
    .ticker { padding:13px 0; overflow:hidden; background:rgba(124,58,237,0.06); border-top:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1); }
    .ticker-track { display:flex; animation:tickMove 20s linear infinite; }
    .t-item {
    white-space:nowrap; padding:0 40px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;
    font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:rgba(196,181,212,0.5);
    border-right:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1);
    }
    .t-gem { font-size:10px; }
    @keyframes tickMove { from{transform:translateX(0);} to{transform:translateX(-50%);} }
    /* ── PRODUCTS ── */
    .products { padding:120px 64px; background:var(--black); }
    .sec-header { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end; margin-bottom:80px; }
    .sec-label { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.4em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:14px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
    .sec-label::before { content:'✦'; font-size:10px; }
    .sec-title { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:clamp(40px, 6vw, 76px); line-height:0.9; color:var(--white); }
    .sec-title .grad { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--violet), var(--pink)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }
    .see-all { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.1em; transition:color 0.3s; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
    .see-all:hover { color:var(--violet); }
    .prod-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:16px; }
    .prod-card {
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.08);
    border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; cursor:none;
    transition:all 0.35s ease;
    position:relative;
    }
    .prod-card:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); border-color:rgba(124,58,237,0.3); box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.12); }
    .prod-img {
    aspect-ratio:3/4; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    .prod-img-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; transition:transform 0.6s ease; }
    .prod-card:hover .prod-img-bg { transform:scale(1.06); }
    .pib1 { background:linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1030, #2d1845, #140c22); }
    .pib2 { background:linear-gradient(145deg, #1e0820, #361040, #180618); }
    .pib3 { background:linear-gradient(145deg, #201020, #381828, #180c18); }
    .pib4 { background:linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1228, #2e1840, #100c20); }
    .prod-glyph {
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:110px; letter-spacing:-0.05em;
    opacity:0.08; position:relative; z-index:1;
    transition:opacity 0.4s, transform 0.5s;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
    }
    .prod-card:hover .prod-glyph { opacity:0.2; transform:scale(1.1) rotate(-4deg); }
    .prod-badge-wrap { position:absolute; top:12px; left:12px; z-index:3; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; }
    .pbadge {
    padding:4px 10px; border-radius:100px;
    font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700;
    display:inline-block;
    }
    .pb-new { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--violet)); color:var(--white); }
    .pb-hot { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pink), #f97316); color:var(--white); }
    .pb-sale { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), #f97316); color:var(--black); }
    .pb-best { background:rgba(124,58,237,0.2); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.4); color:var(--violet); }
    .prod-action {
    position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:3;
    padding:12px;
    transform:translateY(100%); transition:transform 0.35s ease;
    }
    .prod-card:hover .prod-action { transform:translateY(0); }
    .pa-btn {
    width:100%; padding:12px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    color:var(--white); border:none; cursor:none;
    font-family:'Syne', sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.15em; text-transform:uppercase;
    transition:all 0.3s; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px;
    text-decoration:none; border-radius:2px;
    }
    .pa-btn:hover { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pink), var(--purple)); }
    .prod-info { padding:18px 18px 22px; }
    .prod-cat { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:6px; opacity:0.7; }
    .prod-name { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:4px; line-height:1.3; }
    .prod-desc-short { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:12px; line-height:1.5; }
    .prod-price-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
    .prod-price { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); }
    .prod-old { font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); text-decoration:line-through; }
    .prod-price.sale { color:var(--pink); }
    .prod-sizes { display:flex; gap:6px; }
    .size-dot { width:24px; height:24px; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,212,0.15); border-radius:50%; font-size:9px; color:var(--muted); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:all 0.2s; cursor:none; }
    .size-dot:hover { border-color:var(--violet); color:var(--violet); }
    /* ── ABOUT ── */
    .about {
    padding:120px 64px;
    background:var(--dark);
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:80px; align-items:center;
    }
    .about-visual { position:relative; }
    .about-box-main {
    width:100%; padding-bottom:120%; position:relative;
    background:linear-gradient(145deg, var(--panel), #1e1630);
    border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.12);
    border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    .about-box-main::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    }
    .about-bg-text {
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:180px; letter-spacing:-0.05em;
    color:rgba(124,58,237,0.05); position:absolute; user-select:none;
    animation:floatLetter 10s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .about-stat-card {
    position:absolute; bottom:-20px; right:-20px;
    background:var(--card); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2);
    padding:24px 28px; border-radius:4px;
    box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }
    .asc-num { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:48px; line-height:1; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }
    .asc-label { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); }
    .about-content {}
    .about-content .sec-label { margin-bottom:14px; }
    .about-content .sec-title { margin-bottom:28px; }
    .about-body { font-size:15px; line-height:1.9; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:40px; }
    .about-body strong { color:var(--soft); }
    .about-pills { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-bottom:44px; }
    .a-pill {
    padding:8px 18px; border-radius:100px;
    background:rgba(124,58,237,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2);
    font-size:12px; color:var(--soft); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .a-pill:hover { background:rgba(124,58,237,0.15); border-color:var(--violet); }
    .a-pill-icon { font-size:14px; }
    /* ── CONTACT / WA ── */
    .contact {
    padding:100px 64px;
    background:var(--black);
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:80px; align-items:center;
    }
    .contact-left {}
    .contact-title { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:clamp(40px,6vw,80px); line-height:0.9; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:24px; }
    .contact-title .grad { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--violet), var(--pink)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }
    .contact-body { font-size:14px; line-height:1.8; color:var(--muted); max-width:400px; }
    .contact-right { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
    .wa-card {
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.12);
    border-radius:8px; padding:28px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:20px;
    text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.3s; cursor:none;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .wa-card::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    }
    .wa-card:hover { transform:translateX(6px); border-color:rgba(124,58,237,0.3); box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(124,58,237,0.1); }
    .wa-icon {
    width:52px; height:52px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, #25d366, #128c7e);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-size:24px; box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.3);
    }
    .wa-info {}
    .wa-name { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:4px; }
    .wa-num { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:13px; color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:4px; }
    .wa-role { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); }
    .wa-arrow { margin-left:auto; font-size:20px; color:var(--muted); transition:transform 0.3s; }
    .wa-card:hover .wa-arrow { transform:translateX(4px); color:var(--violet); }
    /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
    .testis { padding:100px 64px; background:var(--dark); }
    .testi-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:16px; margin-top:70px; }
    .testi-card {
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.08);
    border-radius:8px; padding:36px 30px;
    transition:all 0.3s; position:relative;
    }
    .testi-card:hover { border-color:rgba(124,58,237,0.25); transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 16px 50px rgba(124,58,237,0.08); }
    .testi-card::before {
    content:'"'; position:absolute; top:16px; right:24px;
    font-family:'Georgia', serif; font-size:64px; color:rgba(124,58,237,0.12); line-height:1;
    }
    .testi-stars { display:flex; gap:4px; margin-bottom:20px; }
    .star { color:var(--gold); font-size:14px; }
    .testi-text { font-size:14px; line-height:1.75; color:var(--soft); margin-bottom:24px; font-style:italic; }
    .testi-divider { width:24px; height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purple), var(--pink)); margin-bottom:16px; border-radius:2px; }
    .testi-name { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); }
    .testi-loc { font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:2px; }
    /* ── NEWSLETTER ── */
    .nl {
    padding:90px 64px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, #0e0818, #160a20, #0e0818);
    border-top:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.1);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:60px;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .nl::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 100% at 50% 50%, rgba(124,58,237,0.07), transparent);
    pointer-events:none;
    }
    .nl-content { position:relative; z-index:1; }
    .nl-title { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,60px); line-height:0.9; color:var(--white); }
    .nl-title span { background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--violet), var(--pink)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }
    .nl-sub { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:12px; }
    .nl-form { position:relative; z-index:1; flex:0 0 460px; }
    .nl-row { display:flex; }
    .nl-inp {
    flex:1; padding:15px 20px;
    background:rgba(124,58,237,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.15); border-right:none;
    color:var(--white); font-family:'Syne', sans-serif; font-size:13px; outline:none;
    transition:border-color 0.3s; border-radius:2px 0 0 2px;
    }
    .nl-inp:focus { border-color:rgba(124,58,237,0.4); }
    .nl-inp::placeholder { color:var(--muted); }
    .nl-btn {
    padding:15px 28px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink));
    color:var(--white); border:none; cursor:none;
    font-family:'Syne', sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    transition:all 0.3s; border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;
    }
    .nl-btn:hover { box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(124,58,237,0.5); }
    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer { background:var(--black); border-top:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.08); }
    .foot-top { padding:80px 64px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.8fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:60px; }
    .foot-logo { font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size:36px; letter-spacing:0.3em; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
    .foot-logo .fdot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--pink)); box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--violet); }
    .foot-tagline { font-size:13px; line-height:1.8; color:var(--muted); max-width:260px; margin-bottom:28px; }
    .foot-wa-links { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
    .fw-link {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    padding:10px 14px; border-radius:6px;
    background:rgba(37,211,102,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(37,211,102,0.12);
    text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .fw-link:hover { background:rgba(37,211,102,0.1); border-color:rgba(37,211,102,0.3); }
    .fw-link span { font-size:12px; color:#25d366; font-weight:600; }
    .fw-link small { font-size:10px; color:var(--muted); display:block; }
    .foot-col-h { font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.4em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--violet); margin-bottom:24px; opacity:0.7; }
    .foot-ul { list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; }
    .foot-ul a { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s; }
    .foot-ul a:hover { color:var(--white); }
    .foot-bottom { padding:24px 64px; border-top:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.06); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .foot-copy { font-size:11px; color:rgba(107,96,128,0.5); }
    .foot-soc { display:flex; gap:24px; }
    .foot-soc a { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.3s; }
    .foot-soc a:hover { color:var(--violet); }
    /* ── REVEAL ── */
    .rv { opacity:0; transform:translateY(44px); transition:opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease; }
    .rv.on { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    /* Hero entrance */
    .hero-eyebrow { animation:up 0.7s ease 0.1s both; }
    .hero-title { animation:up 0.9s ease 0.25s both; }
    .hero-desc { animation:up 0.7s ease 0.45s both; }
    .hero-btns { animation:up 0.7s ease 0.6s both; }
    .hero-trust { animation:up 0.7s ease 0.75s both; }
    .hero-right { animation:up 0.9s ease 0.4s both; }
    @keyframes up { from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(50px);} to{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);} }
    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media(max-width:900px) {
    nav { padding:18px 24px; }
    .nav-links { display:none; }
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:100px 24px 60px; }
    .hero-right { display:none; }
    .products { padding:80px 24px; }
    .prod-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
    .about { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:80px 24px; }
    .about-visual { display:none; }
    .contact { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:80px 24px; }
    .testis { padding:80px 24px; }
    .testi-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .nl { flex-direction:column; padding:60px 24px; }
    .nl-form { flex:unset; width:100%; }
    footer { padding:0; }
    .foot-top { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; padding:60px 24px; gap:40px; }
    .foot-bottom { flex-direction:column; gap:16px; padding:20px 24px; }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div class="cur" id="cur"></div>
    <div class="cur-ring" id="cring"></div>
    <!-- NAV -->
    <nav id="nav">
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-logo-dot"></div>
    LUMIARA
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#produk">Produk</a>
    <a href="#tentang">Tentang</a>
    <a href="#testimoni">Ulasan</a>
    <a href="#kontak">Kontak</a>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-right">
    <a href="https://wa.me/6282227081522" target="_blank" class="nav-wa">💬 Chat Kami</a>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- HERO -->
    <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <div class="particles" id="particles"></div>
    <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">
    <div class="eyebrow-dot"></div>
    Koleksi Terbaru — 2026
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
    <span class="t1">GAYA</span>
    <span class="t2">TANPA</span>
    <span class="t3">BATAS</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">
    <strong>LUMIARA</strong> hadir untuk kamu yang berani tampil beda. Fashion unisex berkualitas tinggi dengan harga yang bersahabat — karena gaya bagus bukan hak satu gender saja.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="#produk" class="btn-grad">🛍️ Lihat Koleksi</a>
    <a href="https://wa.me/6282227081522" target="_blank" class="btn-wa-hero">💬 Order via WhatsApp</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-trust">
    <div class="trust-item">
    <span class="trust-icon">✨</span>
    <div class="trust-text"><strong>Kualitas Premium</strong>Bahan pilihan terbaik</div>
    </div>
    <div class="trust-item">
    <span class="trust-icon">🚀</span>
    <div class="trust-text"><strong>Kirim Cepat</strong>Se-Indonesia 2 hari</div>
    </div>
    <div class="trust-item">
    <span class="trust-icon">💯</span>
    <div class="trust-text"><strong>Garansi Puas</strong>Return 7 hari</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-card-main">
    <div class="card-bg-letter">L</div>
    <div class="card-content-overlay">
    <div class="card-tag">✦ Featured Item</div>
    <div class="card-name">Oversize Jacket</div>
    <div class="card-price">Rp 385.000</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="floating-badge">
    <div class="badge-text">FREE<br>ONGKIR<br>MIN 2</div>
    </div>
    <div class="floating-pill">
    <div class="pill-avatar">👗</div>
    <div class="pill-text">
    <strong>Baru Terjual!</strong>
    Oversize Tee — Size L
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- TICKER -->
    <div class="ticker">
    <div class="ticker-track">
    <div class="t-item"><span class="t-gem">✦</span> Free Ongkir Min. 2 Pcs</div>
    <div class="t-item"><span class="t-gem">✦</span> Kualitas Premium Harga Terjangkau</div>
    <div class="t-item"><span class="t-gem">✦</span> Unisex — Untuk Semua</div>

    <div class="sec-label">Tentang Kami</div>
    <div class="sec-title">KENAPA <span class="grad">LUMIARA?</span></div>
    <p class="about-body">
    <strong>LUMIARA</strong> lahir dari kecintaan kami pada fashion yang inklusif dan berkualitas. Kami percaya setiap orang berhak tampil keren tanpa harus menguras kantong. Semua produk kami dipilih dengan teliti — bahan terbaik, jahitan rapi, dan desain yang nggak lekang oleh waktu.
    </p>
    <div class="about-pills">
    <div class="a-pill"><span class="a-pill-icon">✨</span> Bahan Premium</div>
    <div class="a-pill"><span class="a-pill-icon">🧵</span> Jahitan Rapi</div>

    <div class="a-pill"><span class="a-pill-icon">💜</span> Unisex Friendly</div>
    </div>
    <a href="https://wa.me/6282227081522" target="_blank" class="btn-grad">Hubungi Kami</a>
    </div>
    </section>

    </footer>
    <script>
    // Cursor
    const cur=document.getElementById('cur'), cring=document.getElementById('cring');
    let mx=0,my=0,ox=0,oy=0;
    document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
    mx=e.clientX; my=e.clientY;
    cur.style.left=mx+'px'; cur.style.top=my+'px';
    });
    (function loop(){
    ox+=(mx-ox)*0.12; oy+=(my-oy)*0.12;
    cring.style.left=ox+'px'; cring.style.top=oy+'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    })();
    document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.prod-card,.wa-card').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{ cur.classList.add('big'); cring.classList.add('big'); });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{ cur.classList.remove('big'); cring.classList.remove('big'); });
    });
    // Nav
    window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
    document.getElementById('nav').classList.toggle('scrolled',scrollY>60);
    });
    // Reveal
    const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting) setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('on'),80); });
    },{threshold:0.1});
    document.querySelectorAll('.rv').forEach((el,i)=>{ el.style.transitionDelay=(i%4)*0.1+'s'; obs.observe(el); });
    // Particles
    const pc=document.getElementById('particles');
    const colors=['#7c3aed','#a855f7','#ec4899','#f59e0b'];
    for(let i=0;i<18;i++){
    const p=document.createElement('div'); p.className='p';
    const size=Math.random()*4+2;
    p.style.cssText=`width:${size}px;height:${size}px;background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]};left:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*12+8}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*8}s;`;
    pc.appendChild(p);
    }
    // Newsletter
    document.getElementById('nlBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    const inp=document.querySelector('.nl-inp');
    if(inp.value){ document.getElementById('nlBtn').textContent='Berhasil! 💜'; inp.value=''; setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('nlBtn').textContent='Daftar ✦',3000); }
    });
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>
